text.Build trips that fit your budget, then t: 创建符合预算的旅行，并由实时旅伴陪你出行。
text.Roamly checks estimated flights, stays,: Roamly 会在生成行程前估算机票、住宿、活动、餐饮和当地交通。上传预订截图，解锁行程，让 Roamly 指引你的旅行日。
text.1 free itinerary per account: 每个账户 1 个免费行程
text.Roamly checks trip costs before building: Roamly 会先检查旅行成本，再根据真实预算设计行程。
text.Upload hotel, flight, ticket, or reserva: 上传酒店、航班、门票或预订截图，Roamly 会把它们整理成旅行时间线。
text.Unlock reminders, packing lists, documen: 解锁提醒、打包清单、证件检查、第 1 天激活、附近活动和下一步指引。
text.From countdown to check-in, Roamly stays: 从倒计时到签到，Roamly 一直陪伴旅行者。
text.Get one-week reminders, document and pac: 获得一周前提醒、证件和打包清单、24 小时倒计时、预订时间线、附近活动感知、签到、跳过、下一步指引，以及 Google Maps、Apple Maps 和 Citymapper 导航链接。
text.One free itinerary. Then unlock only the: 一个免费行程。之后只解锁你需要的旅行。
text.No subscriptions. Each account gets 1 fr: 无订阅。每个账户有 1 个免费行程，之后按旅行一次性购买。
每个账户可生成一个完整行程。生成后会锁定，无法编辑。
text.Generate one locked day-by-day itinerary: 为一次旅行生成锁定的每日行程。适合只需要计划时使用。
text.Add reminders, document and packing chec: 为锁定行程添加提醒、证件和打包清单、预订时间线、第 1 天激活、附近活动和下一步帮助。
text.Complete Trip Pack: full itinerary plus: 完整旅行包：一次旅行的完整行程加实时旅伴，节省 $0.99。
text.Continue a draft, open a locked itinerar: 继续草稿，打开锁定行程，或直接进入实时旅伴。
text.Start with one free itinerary per accoun: 每个账户从 1 个免费行程开始。只解锁你想完整使用的新旅行。
登录并把旅行集中管理。
text.Roamly uses a separate Supabase auth set: Roamly 使用独立于 ReviewIntel 的 Supabase 认证。你的旅行数据只保存在 Roamly 表中。
text.Keep the profile simple. Roamly only nee: 资料保持简单即可。Roamly 只需要旅行、归属和支持所需的身份信息。
text.Roamly can remind you about packing, doc: Roamly 可以提醒你打包、证件、签到时间和旅行中的下一步。
text.Phone reminders are blocked. You can sti: 手机提醒已被阻止。你仍可使用 Roamly 应用内通知。
应用内通知会自动工作。手机提醒需要此设备的浏览器权限。
text.This itinerary is locked. To make major: 此行程已锁定。如需重大更改，请创建新行程。
text.A smarter trip flow, from plan to travel: 从计划到出行日，更聪明的旅行流程。
text.Plan with cost awareness, import what yo: Plan with cost awareness, import what you book, and follow the trip from one clean mobile-friendly place.
text.Start free. Unlock only when the trip is: 免费开始，只在真正出行时解锁。
One full itinerary is free per account. Paid unlocks are one-time purchases for one trip, not subscriptions.
text.Roamly - budget-aware trips with a Live: Roamly - budget-aware trips with a Live Trip Companion.
text.One free itinerary now. One-time trip pa: One free itinerary now. One-time trip packs later.
text.No buyer/seller/admin tier complexity. R: No buyer/seller/admin tier complexity. Roamly stays light.
text.Check your email to verify your Roamly a: Check your email to verify your Roamly account, then log in.
text.Use at least 8 characters for the passwo: Use at least 8 characters for the password.
Your Live Trip Companion is ready.
text.Generate your free itinerary, or unlock: Generate your free itinerary, or unlock a paid itinerary for a new trip.
text.Payments unlock one itinerary or Live Tr: Payments unlock one itinerary or Live Trip Companion for one trip.
text.Roamly uses your location only to activa: Roamly uses your location only to activate trip mode, show nearby activities, and help with your travel timeline. You can turn it off anytime.
text.Destination / city / country: 目的地 / 城市 / 国家
text.Use your comfortable total. Roamly check: Use your comfortable total. Roamly checks flights, stays, food, activities, local transportation, and buffer before generation.
text.Add mobility needs, must-see spots, food: Add mobility needs, must-see spots, food restrictions, celebrations, weather backup plans, or anything Roamly should consider.
text.Review your trip details carefully. Once: Review your trip details carefully. Once your itinerary is generated, it cannot be edited. New destinations, date changes, or major changes require a new itinerary.
text.One custom itinerary for one trip. No su: One custom itinerary for one trip. No subscription.
You get 1 free itinerary per account.
text.Once generated, this itinerary cannot be: Once generated, this itinerary cannot be edited or regenerated. Please confirm your destination, dates, travelers, budget, and preferences are correct.
text.Your budget is tight. Roamly will priori: Your budget is tight. Roamly will prioritize affordable stays, free attractions, public transit, and low-cost food.
text.This trip may exceed your budget. You ca: This trip may exceed your budget. You can still continue, but Roamly recommends changing dates, destination, trip length, or excluding flights/hotel.
Your trip looks possible within budget.
text.Unlock Live Trip Companion to show trip: Unlock Live Trip Companion to show trip reminders, booking timeline updates, and airline-style live updates here.
text.Review your trip details before generati: Review your trip details before generating. Once generated, this itinerary is locked permanently.
text.The itinerary is permanent for this trip: The itinerary is permanent for this trip. Live Trip Companion is optional per trip.
text.Generate once to lock the final itinerar: Generate once to lock the final itinerary for this trip.
This itinerary is final for this trip.
text.To change destination, dates, traveler c: To change destination, dates, traveler count, budget, interests, or schedule, create a new itinerary. Live Trip Companion can be added without changing the itinerary.
text.Full details, addresses, maps, timing, c: Full details, addresses, maps, timing, checklist, and activity details are shown only after this itinerary is generated and locked.
text.Generate and lock this itinerary to see: Generate and lock this itinerary to see the full details.
text.Generate this trip when the details are: Generate this trip when the details are final.
text.Once generated, the itinerary cannot be: Once generated, the itinerary cannot be edited or regenerated.
Unlock the companion for this trip.
text.Roamly keeps the trip timeline, booking: Roamly keeps the trip timeline, booking reminders, nearby activities, check-ins, and up-next guidance in one mobile-friendly place.
Live Trip Companion is not unlocked yet.
text.Add the companion to use phone reminders: Add the companion to use phone reminders, check-ins, skips, nearby sensing, and travel-day guidance.
text.Roamly will surface the next useful stop: Roamly will surface the next useful stop.
text.Roamly will keep your in-app timeline re: Roamly will keep your in-app timeline ready. Phone reminders are optional.
text.Document requirements can change. Please: Document requirements can change. Please verify official government, embassy, airline, and destination sources before travel.
Document requirements can change. Please verify official sources before travel.
text.Send the trip destination, account email: Send the trip destination, account email, and a short description of what happened. Keep booking confirmations and urgent travel changes with the provider too.
text.Roamly stores account email, profile nam: Roamly stores account email, profile name, trip inputs, itinerary data, booking fields you confirm, checklist status, payments, and basic usage counts.
text.Roamly uses roamly_ database tables and: Roamly uses roamly_ database tables and separate environment variables. ReviewIntel data must not be mixed into Roamly.
text.Trip details may be sent to the OpenAI A: Trip details may be sent to the OpenAI API to generate itineraries. Locked itineraries are not regenerated.
text.Stripe handles checkout. Roamly stores p: Stripe handles checkout. Roamly stores payment status and Stripe identifiers, not raw card numbers.
text.Roamly asks for location and push permis: Roamly asks for location and push permission only when Live Trip Companion needs it. In-app reminders still work if phone/browser push is denied.
text.You can log out, update your profile, tu: You can log out, update your profile, turn off trip sensing, and contact support for account or trip data questions.
text.Roamly provides AI-generated travel plan: Roamly provides AI-generated travel planning assistance, 1 free itinerary per account, paid full itinerary unlocks, and live trip organization tools.
text.You must verify opening hours, prices, v: You must verify opening hours, prices, visa rules, passport requirements, booking terms, transit schedules, weather, safety conditions, and local laws before traveling.
text.Paid Full Itinerary Unlocks, Live Trip C: Paid Full Itinerary Unlocks, Live Trip Companion add-ons, and Complete Trip Packs are one-time digital purchases. Once generated, an itinerary is locked and cannot be remade or regenerated.
text.Roamly may suggest places, areas, search: Roamly may suggest places, areas, searches, and map queries, but it does not guarantee availability, safety, accuracy, or booking completion.
text.Some booking, hotel, activity, transport: Some booking, hotel, activity, transport, or insurance links may be affiliate links. Roamly may earn from qualifying purchases at no extra cost to you.
